mapper.sql: id, reservation_id, user_id, store_id, manager_id, rating, `text`, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM review WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM review WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (id, reservation_id, user_id, store_id, manager_id, rating, `text`, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{reservationId}, #{userId}, #{storeId}, #{managerId}, #{rating}, #{text}, #{createdAt})
